top_signals.title: 'I never heard of the Strait of Hormuz before this': How one medical supply CEO is navigating the oil price shock
top_signals.summary: Medical supply company Gentell sources raw materials from around the world, and the crisis at the Strait of Hormuz is causing volatility for its business.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
